Cook-App
  • Frontend
  • Add recipe
  • View page source

Add recipe

Screen: /addRecipe

AddRecipe provides a form to create a new recipe and upload images. It sends a multipart/form-data POST to /add-recipe.

Service

  • frontend/features/add_recipe/services/recipe_service.dart::RecipeService.addRecipe

Notes

  • Steps and ingredients are encoded as JSON and sent as fields. Images are attached as files with names recipe-main-image and step-image-<index>.
